refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, detect obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Breaking down the broad requirement into specific sub-functions ensures clarity and testability: terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation are distinct but related functions necessary for comprehensive worksite modeling.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify each sub-function via simulation and field data: terrain analysis accuracy via elevation maps, obstacle detection via sensor validation, and work-zone representation via map overlays.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone including boundaries and operational zones.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle data acquisition.
DP2: Implement spatial data processing algorithms for terrain modeling and obstacle classification.
DP3: Generate digital map overlays for work-zone representation with geofencing.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, and DP3 combined to fulfill the refined FRs.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle detection algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically coupled but modular; sensor fusion feeds both terrain and obstacle analysis, while map generation depends on processed data outputs.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity sensors and reliable data processing.
Risk of data latency affecting real-time mapping accuracy.
High safety criticality demands robust fault detection in sensor data.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data acquisition and processing to isolate faults and improve maintainability.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized processing and integration of terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation functions.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data streams from Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to Vehicle and Teleoperation for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Issues alerts related to detected obstacles or unsafe terrain conditions to Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core processing is centralized here; low diffusion as interfaces are well-defined.
Vehicle module mainly provides raw data; less suitable for core processing.
Primarily for remote control; not ideal for worksite modeling.
Receives alerts but does not perform mapping functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping functions within NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports integrated data processing.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too complex.
Integration challenges with real-time data from Vehicle and Teleoperation.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution; consider sub-module decomposition if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by selected DPs with clear logical mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Risk of over-centralization in NGHE Solution module leading to maintenance challenges.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the primary module; interfaces are clearly defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via integrated system tests using telemetry and tasking interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Plan for modular decomposition within NGHE Solution if complexity increases.
Define detailed interface protocols for telemetry and safety alert data.

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and allocation meets requirements with acceptable risk and clear architectural boundaries.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect obstacles within the worksite area.
FR3: Represent the work-zone including boundaries and operational zones.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensor data is available and reliable.
NGHE Solution module can handle processing load.
open_risks: Potential latency in real-time data processing.
Complexity growth in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of sensor fusion and processing algorithms.
Interface validation tests between NGHE Solution and Vehicle/Teleoperation.
